title: IntegrationManifest
description: Schema for Flowmanner integration manifest files. Each manifest drives UI, API, docs, and testing for a single integration.

slug.description: Unique identifier for the integration (lowercase, hyphens/underscores only)

description.description: Short description shown on the integration card

category.description: Integration category for filtering and grouping

auth_type.description: Authentication method used by this integration

icon_url.description: URL or path to the integration icon

description.description: Human-readable description of what this capability does

parameters.description: Optional parameter schema for this capability

capabilities.description: List of capabilities this integration provides

endpoint.description: API endpoint to call for health checking

method.description: HTTP method for the health check

expected_status.description: Expected HTTP status code for a healthy response

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for the health check request

enabled.description: Whether the playground is available for this integration

label.description: Button label shown to the user

description.description: Description of what this demo action does

demo_actions.description: List of demo actions available in the playground

version.description: Semantic version of the integration manifest
